title: Mudusa Spider Origin
description: You are a race species of magical spider. A sentient species that is well known for there paralizing poision.
body:
This origin is rather powerful, and uses [eggolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/eggolib) to create parlasis effects. It may work without [eggolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/eggolib), but less effectively. I also like the changes to arachnid done by [OriginsTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/originstweaks), and as such this origin uses Arachnid as a base, and then adds onto it. It may work without [OriginsTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/originstweaks).

I also have a unchoseable version of this origin, for you admins out there who only want some players to get it. As it makes it only obtainable with the /origin command.


![The Origin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/064049f261578599ca6237ad2f78fff41229f047.png)
